channel.title: DARPA News (sample)
channel.description: Sample darpa.mil news feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: DARPA launches new autonomous systems research program
item.description: DARPA announced a new research program to advance machine learning for autonomous platforms.

item.title: DARPA demonstrates AI dogfighting agent in live flight test
item.description: An artificial intelligence agent flew autonomous within-visual-range maneuvers during a live flight test.

item.title: DARPA hosts community open house event
item.description: The agency welcomed students and families for a day of science exhibits.
